recent_tasks.finding: [agent:reality-checker][q=0.650]openclaw agent's web search execution strategy for contextual information | Consistent generation of low-quality search results (q<0.30) for tasks requiring memory retrieval ('fluid-memory') and SEO/affiliate content research, stemming from overly generic and uncontextualized search queries. | Develop a more robust search protocol. Prioritize using memory_search for internal context before resorting to web_search. When performing web searches, dynamically construct specific and goal-oriented queries by incorporating relevant keywords from memory files (MEMORY.md, memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md) and task-specific objectives. For SEO/affiliate tasks, ensure queries are precisely tailored to the project context rather than using vague instructions.
